title: Gorgo integration catalog entry
description: One integration configurable through @gorgo/medusa-integration. One file per integration at catalog/integrations/<identifier>.yml.

identifier.description: Stable id for the integration; matches the provider's `static identifier` for integrations built on AbstractIntegrationProvider. Unique across the catalog. Lowercase-kebab; matches the icon basename by convention.

npm.description: npm package that ships the provider.

category.description: Which Medusa module this integration configures (matches the descriptor's `category`). NOTE: a different value set from the site's plugin `category` — mapped at merge time.

author.description: Author id; must exist in catalog/authors.yml. Merged into the site catalog's `author` field.

displayName.description: Card title. Merged into plugins.yml `name.*.label` on the site.

shortDescription.description: One-line card subtitle. Seeds the site short description.

icon.description: Icon filename under catalog/icons/. Square, <= 50 KB, no remote refs inside the SVG.

configSnippet.description: Illustrative medusa-config.ts registration, shown in the Admin "Setup guide" drawer.

active.description: Set false to hide the entry without deleting it.
